task: place the purple object on top of the drawer
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A white drawer is open, revealing a purple object inside. A white tray is on the floor in front of the drawer. The purple object is small and likely a bottle or container. The drawer is a flat surface with a handle on the right side. **STRATEGY -** First, reach into the drawer to grasp the purple object. Then, transport it to the white tray and place it there. The task requires precise grasping and placement to avoid dropping the object. **AFFORDANCE REASONING -** Step 1: Reach into the drawer to grasp the purple object. The affordance is the object's body. Step 2: Grasp the purple object by its body for a secure hold. Step 3: Transport the object to the white tray. The affordance is an empty area on the tray. Step 4: Place the object on the tray gently to ensure stability.

Goal: on(purple_object, white_tray); stable(purple_object)
Scene: purple_object, white_drawer, white_tray, floor
Step 1: reach(purple_object)
  affordance_region: the body of the purple object
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, purple_object, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, purple_object) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(purple_object)
  affordance_region: the body of the purple object
  contact: holding(purple_object) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(purple_object)
Step 3: transport(purple_object -> white_tray)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the white tray
  spatial: above(purple_object, white_tray, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(purple_object)
  done_when: above(purple_object, white_tray, 0.05)
Step 4: place(purple_object -> white_tray)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the white tray
  contact: surface_contact(purple_object, white_tray) [completion]; released(purple_object) [completion]
  pose: stable(purple_object) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(purple_object, white_tray) AND released(purple_object)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the purple object
the body of the purple object
an empty area on the white tray
